allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $src=[System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\("$env:TEMP\\dark_quiz.png"\); $h=$src.Height; $w=$src.Width; $cropH=[Math]::Min\(950,$h\); $crop=New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($w,$cropH\); $g=[System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($crop\); $g.DrawImage\($src,\(New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\(0,0,$w,$cropH\)\),\(New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\(0,$h-$cropH,$w,$cropH\)\),[System.Drawing.GraphicsUnit]::Pixel\); $crop.Save\("$env:TEMP\\dark_quiz_crop.png"\); $g.Dispose\(\);$crop.Dispose\(\);$src.Dispose\(\); "cropped $w x $cropH from total height $h")
